_metadata.description: Libya SISEPUEDE baseline parameters for NDC simulation
_metadata.data_status: MIXED — batch_data_generation CSVs provide per-sector parameters; GDP/population trajectories are synthetic from NDC assumptions; input_base_all_sectors.csv does NOT include LBY (only 70 countries)
notes: Libya is present in ALL per-sector batch CSVs (2010-2050, time_periods -5 to 35).
Libya is NOT in input_base_all_sectors.csv — this file covers only 70 pre-built countries.
A full Libya template must be assembled from the batch_data CSVs and the synthetic GDP/population trajectories below.
Power mix fractions in nemomod CSVs show ~95% gas, ~4% oil historically; no renewables.

socioeconomic.description: GDP and population trajectories from NDC assumptions. GDP in 2015 USD billions (constant prices).

gdp_trajectory_usd_2015_billions.source: Libya NDC assumptions provided by ORCHESTRATOR
gdp_trajectory_usd_2015_billions.notes: Pre-2025 values estimated from World Bank/IMF data consistent with oil-state recovery patterns. 2025-2035 from NDC assumptions.

population_trajectory.source: UN World Population Prospects + NDC assumptions

emissions_baseline_2023.description: Sector-level GHG emissions for 2023 baseline year (Libya Third NC / NDC inventory)

fugitive_oil_and_gas.notes: Includes venting, flaring, and distribution/transmission/production losses

energy_industries.notes: Electricity generation (mostly gas turbines) + stationary combustion

power_sector_baseline.description: Power generation mix for Libya. Sources: ENTC batch data (NeMo-Mod residual capacity) + NDC stated values.

generation_mix_2023.notes: NDC-stated mix. Batch data shows ~95% gas fraction in min_share_production (2015-2025), which may reflect older IEA data. Discrepancy: NDC shows higher diesel/oil share vs batch data. Use NDC values for calibration.

power_sector_baseline.notes_batch_data: inputs_by_country_modvar_entc_nemomod_residual_capacity.csv shows gas capacity 8.8 GW (2015) declining to 1.0 GW (2035) as plants age; oil capacity 0.6 GW (2015) to 0 GW (2025+). New capacity must be added by NeMo-Mod LP.

transmission_loss.note: Actual 2015 value from batch data: frac_enfu_transmission_loss_fuel_electricity. High losses consistent with aging infrastructure. NDC value ~22% is for generation-level losses; SISEPUEDE variable is transmission fraction.

fuel_costs_2023_usd.notes: Libya subsidizes domestic fuel prices heavily; these may be export-parity prices from the batch data rather than domestic retail prices.

scoe_energy.description: Stationary combustion of energy (buildings/commercial). From non_electric_energy_inputs CSVs.

ndc_targets.notes: Unconditional: 12.9% reduction below BAU by 2035. Conditional on international support: 21% reduction. Key mitigation sectors: renewables expansion, oil & gas fugitives, transport efficiency.

critical_missing.input_base_all_sectors: Libya NOT in this 70-country pre-built database. Full sector template must be assembled from batch CSVs + synthetic socioeconomic data.
critical_missing.afolu_imports_exports_future: Only 2011-2019 historical AFOLU trade data; 2020-2050 must be extrapolated or set to 2019 values.
critical_missing.nemomod_max_technological_capacity: inputs_by_country_modvar_entc_nemomod_max_technological_capacity.csv has 0 Libya rows — cap constraints must be set from NDC renewable targets or left unconstrained.
